description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof finished in dark brown, and white exterior walls. The front facade features large arched windows, a central entryway with steps, and a prominent attached garage with a driveway. The house is surrounded by neatly trimmed green lawns and several mature trees, adding to its residential charm. The rear of the house includes a patio area, visible from the back, and additional windows for natural light. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and a shingled roof. The overall design is spacious, with a clear separation between living areas and the garage, typical of modern American suburban homes.
description: A single-story suburban house with a dark brown multi-gabled roof, white walls, large arched windows, and an attached garage, surrounded by green lawns and trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown roof, white walls, and two trees on the lawn, with minimal window detail visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with steps, large arched windows, and the attached garage on the right, flanked by trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn, patio area, and additional windows, with trees positioned behind the house.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the driveway leading to the garage, main entry steps, and the arrangement of trees and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, no porch, flanked by large arched windows and a simple door
